user.title: Set up IR Remote
user.description: Select the infrared receiver entity to listen on.

data_description.receiver: The infrared receiver entity provided by ESPHome, Broadlink, or another integration.

abort.no_infrared_receivers: No infrared receiver entities were found. Make sure your IR receiver device is adopted and connected in Home Assistant.

init.title: Timing options
init.description: Tune the timing windows to match your remote hardware.

data_description.debounce_window: Signals arriving faster than this are treated as repeats and ignored.
data_description.new_press_window: Gap required before the same button is treated as a new press rather than a double-click.
data_description.double_click_window: Maximum gap between two presses to be counted as a double-click.
data_description.learn_timeout: How long to wait for an IR signal during the Learn button flow.
data_description.immediate_single: When enabled, single presses fire immediately; a second press within the double-click window fires an additional _2x event. When disabled, single press is held until the double-click window expires (adds latency).

mismatch.title: Signals didn't match
mismatch.description: The two presses produced different signals. This can happen with noisy receivers or if you accidentally pressed a different button. Press **Try again** to start over.

name.title: Name this button
name.description: Both presses matched — signal confirmed. Give this button a name so you can use it in automations.

timeout.title: No signal detected
timeout.description: No IR signal was received within the timeout period. Point your remote directly at the receiver and press the button firmly, then try again.

progress.press_button: Press the button on your remote now…
progress.press_button_again: Got it — now press the **same button** again to confirm.

abort.capture_failed: Failed to capture IR signal due to an unexpected error.
